modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: iPad screen is cracked after slipping out of case

full_description_text:  
So, the user was just using their iPad, right? Then it slipped out of the case and bam! The screen is all cracked now. They’re asking if it can be fixed, but it sounds like a real mess.
short_description: iPad screen is cracked after slipping out of case
description: So, the user was just using their iPad, right? Then it slipped out of the case and bam! The screen is all cracked now. They’re asking if it can be fixed, but it sounds like a real mess.
